_comment: HONEST but under-rotated: RY(0.6*pi) on q0 (instead of the exact H = RY(0.5*pi) up to phase) then the real GHZ cascade cx(0,1);cx(1,2). The claimed fidelity is exactly the judge's own recompute -- REPRODUCIBILITY holds -- and it clears the classical baseline (0.5) by a wide margin. It trips PERFORMANCE ALONE (exit 5): close, well ahead of a naive guess, but short of the 0.99 bar. The canonical 'correct claim, just not good enough' reject -- distinct from a reproducibility lie (FORGED) or a structural violation (3CX).
